name: ytdl-sparks
description: Desktop downloader GUI built on top of yt-dlp
author: William Awuku

scripts.dist: npm run dist:mac && npm run dist:win
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:mac-resources && npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:win-resources && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
